## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Reads `docs/art-bible.md`
- [ ] Follows `docs/visual-development-pipeline.md`
- [ ] Asset or style pass is visible in Godot or documented with a review capture
- [ ] Readable at 1280x800
- [ ] Source/license notes are recorded

## Done when

- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] `npm run test:product` runs for Godot scene/script/resource changes
- [ ] PR notes include manual or screenshot verification
